title: MT Quality Evaluation Study
description: Evaluating machine-translated texts from French to English.

consent.title: Informed Consent
consent.text:
You are invited to participate in a research study on how people evaluate machine-translated texts.

This study is part of a research project investigating translation quality assessment. Your participation will help us understand how bilingual readers evaluate automatically translated content.
consent.withdrawal_text: You may close the browser at any time to withdraw. Partial responses will be deleted.

post_task_questions.text: How would you rate your French reading ability?
How would you rate your English reading ability?
What is your field of study?
What is your current level of study?
How often do you use machine translation tools (Google Translate, DeepL, etc.)?
In a few words, describe the strategy you used to decide whether a translation was acceptable.
post_task_questions.placeholder: e.g., I read the English first, then compared with the French...
